content:
ah, please ping me next time, I'm sorry - it's not too easy for me to see questions in threads like this

so to answer, pickman is... a decent character in general, although they do have some mixed synergy with uvhash - mostly their E1 especially can bloat the hand at times and you really need to get it of course because their E2 and E3 are of such high importance. with that being said, as long as you keep your hand size under control some of pickman's relics are really strong for uvhash, and uvhash is one of the few characters in the game with a very high direct damage exalt as well.

in short, they're not really a replacement to thais but they are one of the next best options available until you get thais in the future. you might want to run 2 characters capable of generating aliemus and embryos without thais because pickman doesn't really bring enough by themselves in my opinion
thread_title: An Uvhash Guide to Dealing Death and (perhaps) not Receiving It in Kind
